section.title: Step 1: Pick runner per language
section.p: Action: Python → pytest; JS → Vitest; Go → testing; E2E → Playwright.

section.title: Step 2: Wire config
section.p: Action: Per-runner config with strict markers, coverage, parallel.

section.title: Step 3: Structure AAA
section.p: Action: Write tests as Arrange / Act / Assert.

section.title: Step 4: Add coverage gate
section.p: Action: Set --cov-fail-under or equivalent per runner.

section.title: Step 5: Separate lanes
section.p: Action: Split unit / integration / E2E by tag or directory.

section.title: Step 6: Wire CI matrix
section.p: Action: CI runs each language + each lane in parallel jobs.
